name: Panjawattana Plastic Public Company Limited
summary: Panjawattana Plastic Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes plastic packaging products for consumer products, agro chemicals, automotive parts, lubricants, and milk and yoghurt milk in Thailand and China. The company operates through Plant - Samuthsakhon, Plant - Chonburi, Plant - Bangkok, Plant - Tianjin (China), Plant - Jiangsu (China), and Business Trading segments. It also trades in lid and plastic resins; and provides service to check the amount/standards of various goods and inspect measurement tools. Panjawattana Plastic Public Company Limited is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
